title: DAC thermodynamic separation floor W_min=RT·ln(1/x) ≈19.3 kJ/mol at 420 ppm, monotone-rising as air gets more dilute
Today's DAC capture energy sits ~10× (band 3–30×) above the thermodynamic floor — finite headroom, not a ceiling
The 48 mmol/g (=J₂·φ) sorbent target is physically unreachable — 211% CO₂ by sorbent mass, ≥4.8× any measured adsorbent
